description_long: This bird features a sleek, streamlined body with predominantly dark gray plumage and a strikingly long, pointed orange beak. Its head is adorned with a prominent crest of feathers, giving it a distinctive silhouette. The wings are broad and outstretched, with smooth, slightly curved edges, while the tail is short and wedge-shaped with layered feathers. The eyes are large and pale blue, set against the dark head, and the legs are slender and gray with visible talons. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for swift flight and agile movement, with a bold color contrast between the beak and the rest of the body. The surface appears matte and smooth, with minimal textural variation across the feathers.
description: A dark gray bird with a long orange beak, prominent head crest, broad wings, and wedge-shaped tail, featuring pale blue eyes and slender gray legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed beak, symmetrical wings, and the prominent head crest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated beak, layered crest, and the wedge-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad wingspan, short tail, and the back of the head crest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beak, crest, and tail from the opposite angle.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray with subtle gradients and a contrasting orange beak
